name: BEN_TYPE_VALUES
description: This table will hold the Benefits Lookup types details.

columns.Name: TYPE_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: This column is Foreign Key to BEN_TYPES.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column will store the active from start date.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column will store the active till end date.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: This column will store the Enterprise ID.

columns.Name: TYPE_NUM
columns.Comments: This column will store the Numeric Type Value.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the type values is active.

columns.Name: TYPE_CD
columns.Comments: This column will store the alphanumeric type value.

columns.Name: TYPE_RL
columns.Comments: Formula ID for the Type Value.

columns.Name: MEANING
columns.Comments: Description of the Type Value to be used in Pre-Determined List of Values.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_1
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_2
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_3
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_4
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_5
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_1
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_2
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_3
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_4
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_5
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_1
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_2
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_3
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_4
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_5
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
